## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] tests were added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] docs were updated where behavior, setup, adapters, benchmarks, or costs changed

## Release And Dependency Review

- [ ] no secrets, private corpora, generated benchmark dumps, model weights, virtualenvs, caches, or downloaded archives were added
- [ ] new files are intentionally committed source/docs/fixtures, or ignored if generated/local
- [ ] dependency changes include license and install-footprint notes
- [ ] benchmark changes include date, hardware, corpus, mode, and cost context
- [ ] cloud/API cost disclosures include date and provider/model names

## Notes

- optional follow-up work, caveats, or reviewer guidance
